---
title: "Mapping Districts of Texas and Maryland"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: openintro::lab_report
---

```{r load-packages, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(openintro)
library(alarmdata)
library(redist)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggredist)
```

### Texas

Link to SHP file for 2025 approved redistricting map: https://redistrictingdatahub.org/dataset/2025-texas-congressional-districts-approved-plan/

```{r}
map_texas <- alarm_50state_map('TX')
#plans_texas <- alarm_50state_plans('TX')

# precinct map
map_texas |> 
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = ndv / (nrv + ndv))) +
    scale_fill_party_c() +
    theme_map()

# 2020 district map
map_texas |> 
    ggplot() +
    geom_district(aes(group = cd_2020, fill = ndv, denom = nrv + ndv)) +
    scale_fill_party_c() +
    theme_map()
```

### Maryland

```{r}
map_maryland <- alarm_50state_map('MD')
#plans_maryland <- alarm_50state_plans('MD')

# precinct map
map_maryland |> 
    ggplot() +
    geom_sf(aes(fill = ndv / (nrv + ndv))) +
    scale_fill_party_c() +
    theme_map()

# 2020 district map
map_maryland |> 
    ggplot() +
    geom_district(aes(group = cd_2020, fill = ndv, denom = nrv + ndv)) +
    scale_fill_party_c() +
    theme_map()

# Not working yet
#proposed_maryland_map <- readr::read_csv("DKunes_Submission.csv")
#proposed_maryland_map |>
#  ggplot() +
#  geom_district()
```
